text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The day of the Takamatsunomiya Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Bakushin O, still carrying on along the
Bakushin Road, vows to score a triumphant win
over Nishino Flower. She burns with competitive
spirit.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before the race draws to a head, she declares
she'll win over Nishino Flower by 1,000 lengths.
With the vow made, she steps foot on the
battlefield!
